author: EldritchTentacles
name: PBRMaps3D
shortDescription: Apply PBR texture maps (albedo, normal, roughness, metalness, AO, height, emissive) to 3D objects
description: Apply PBR texture maps (albedo/diffuse, normal, roughness, metalness, ambient occlusion, displacement/height and emissive) to 3D cubes and models. Supports PNG and WebP formats.

eventsFunctions.description: Apply a normal map to add realistic surface details like bumps and texture. Works with 3D cubes, models, and animated models.
eventsFunctions.name: SetNormalMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set normal map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_ and intensity _PARAM4_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the normal map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The normal map image (purple/blue texture). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: NormalMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

parameters.description: Intensity/strength of the normal map effect. 1 = normal, 0 = no effect, 2 = double strength
parameters.name: Intensity

eventsFunctions.description: Remove normal map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveNormalMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove normal map from
parameters.name: Object

eventsFunctions.description: Apply an ambient occlusion (AO) map to a 3D object. AO maps multiply lighting and require a second UV set (uv2) on the model for accurate results.
eventsFunctions.name: SetAOMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set AO map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_ and intensity _PARAM4_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the AO map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The AO map image (grayscale). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: AOMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

parameters.description: Intensity/strength of the AO map effect. 1 = normal, 0 = no effect, 2 = double strength
parameters.name: Intensity

eventsFunctions.description: Remove AO map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveAOMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove AO map from
parameters.name: Object

eventsFunctions.description: Apply a displacement/height map to add real geometry variation when supported by the mesh. Many models require additional vertex density for visible displacement.
eventsFunctions.name: SetHeightMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set height map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_ and intensity _PARAM4_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the height map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The height/displacement map image (grayscale). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: HeightMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

parameters.description: Intensity/strength of the displacement. Small values like 0.1 often work best.
parameters.name: Intensity

eventsFunctions.description: Remove height/displacement map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveHeightMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove height map from
parameters.name: Object

eventsFunctions.description: Apply an emissive map (glow) to a 3D object. The emissive color/intensity controls how bright the emissive map appears.
eventsFunctions.name: SetEmissiveMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set emissive map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_ and intensity _PARAM4_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the emissive map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The emissive map image (colors represent glowing areas). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: EmissiveMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

parameters.description: Intensity/strength of the emissive effect. 1 = normal, 2 = brighter
parameters.name: Intensity

eventsFunctions.description: Remove emissive map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveEmissiveMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove emissive map from
parameters.name: Object

eventsFunctions.description: Apply an albedo/diffuse map (base color texture) to a 3D object. This replaces or adds the main color texture.
eventsFunctions.name: SetAlbedoMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set albedo map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the albedo map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The albedo/diffuse map image (base color texture). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: AlbedoMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

eventsFunctions.description: Remove albedo/diffuse map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveAlbedoMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove albedo map from
parameters.name: Object

eventsFunctions.description: Apply a roughness map to control surface smoothness per-pixel. Black = smooth/shiny, White = rough/matte.
eventsFunctions.name: SetRoughnessMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set roughness map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the roughness map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The roughness map image (grayscale: black=smooth, white=rough). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: RoughnessMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

eventsFunctions.description: Remove roughness map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveRoughnessMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove roughness map from
parameters.name: Object

eventsFunctions.description: Apply a metalness map to control which areas are metallic per-pixel. Black = non-metal (plastic, wood), White = metal.
eventsFunctions.name: SetMetalnessMap
eventsFunctions.sentence: Set metalness map of _PARAM1_ to _PARAM2_ with scale _PARAM3_

parameters.description: The 3D object to apply the metalness map to
parameters.name: Object

parameters.description: The metalness map image (grayscale: black=non-metal, white=metal). PNG or WebP recommended.
parameters.name: MetalnessMap

parameters.description: How many times the texture repeats. 1 = no repeat, 2 = repeats 2x, 0.5 = stretched
parameters.name: Scale

eventsFunctions.description: Remove metalness map from a 3D object.
eventsFunctions.name: RemoveMetalnessMap

parameters.description: The 3D object to remove metalness map from
parameters.name: Object
